0.text: Associated compression atelectasis with right-sided pleural effusion

1.text: Scarring with thickening in the inferior-posterior portion of the left lung

2.text: Scarring with thickening in the mediastinal-adjacent pleura

3.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs, more pronounced on the right

4.text: Increased peribronchial thickening in the right lung

5.text: Linear atelectasis in the upper and middle lobe segments of the right lung
